india_destinations.name: Agra
india_destinations.description: Home to the iconic Taj Mahal, a symbol of eternal love and Mughal splendor.

india_destinations.name: Agartala
india_destinations.description: Capital of Tripura, blending Bengali culture with royal heritage.

india_destinations.name: Ahmedabad
india_destinations.description: India's first UNESCO World Heritage City, rich in textile history.

india_destinations.name: Aizawl
india_destinations.description: A scenic hill city offering panoramic views of the Blue Mountains.

india_destinations.name: Ajanta-Ellora
india_destinations.description: Ancient UNESCO caves showcasing incredible Buddhist and Hindu rock-cut art.

india_destinations.name: Alleppey
india_destinations.description: The 'Venice of the East', famous for its tranquil backwater cruises.

india_destinations.name: Amritsar
india_destinations.description: Spiritual center of Sikhism and home to the stunning Harmandir Sahib.

india_destinations.name: Bangalore
india_destinations.description: The Silicon Valley of India, known for its gardens and vibrant nightlife.

india_destinations.name: Bhopal
india_destinations.description: The City of Lakes, blending natural beauty with Nawabi culture.

india_destinations.name: Bhubaneswar
india_destinations.description: The Temple City of India, rich in architectural heritage.

india_destinations.name: Bodh Gaya
india_destinations.description: Where Prince Siddhartha attained enlightenment and became Buddha.

india_destinations.name: Coorg
india_destinations.description: The 'Scotland of India', famous for its misty hills and coffee estates.

india_destinations.name: Dalhousie
india_destinations.description: A charming hill station with distinct colonial vibes and pine forests.

india_destinations.name: Darjeeling
india_destinations.description: Queen of the Hills, offering spectacular Himalayan views.

india_destinations.name: Delhi
india_destinations.famous_for: Red Fort, Qutub Minar, Street Food
india_destinations.description: India's capital, a massive city where history and modernity collide.

india_destinations.name: Dharamshala
india_destinations.description: The spiritual home of the Tibetan people in exile.

india_destinations.name: Dwarka
india_destinations.description: Ancient sacred city on the Arabian Sea, linked to Lord Krishna.

india_destinations.name: Gangtok
india_destinations.description: A clean, modern hill city and portal to high Himalayan adventures.

india_destinations.name: Goa
india_destinations.description: India's beach paradise, famous for its coastline and vibrant nightlife.

india_destinations.name: Gokarna
india_destinations.description: A serene alternative to Goa, known for its pristine beaches.

india_destinations.name: Gulmarg
india_destinations.description: The 'Meadow of Flowers', a world-class skiing destination.

india_destinations.name: Guwahati
india_destinations.description: The gateway to Northeast India, located on the mighty Brahmaputra.

india_destinations.name: Gwalior
india_destinations.description: Famed for its imposing fort and rich musical history.

india_destinations.name: Hampi
india_destinations.description: Ancient ruins of the Vijayanagara Empire across a boulder-strewn landscape.

india_destinations.name: Haridwar
india_destinations.description: Holy city where the Ganges enters the plains, a major pilgrimage hub.

india_destinations.name: Hyderabad
india_destinations.description: A historic hub of Nizams, famous for its gems and delicious cuisine.

india_destinations.name: Imphal
india_destinations.description: Culturally rich gateway to the unique floating islands of Manipur.

india_destinations.name: Indore
india_destinations.description: Cleanest city with a legendary street food scene.

india_destinations.name: Jaipur
india_destinations.description: The 'Pink City', famous for its royal forts and grand palaces.

india_destinations.name: Jaisalmer
india_destinations.description: The 'Golden City', rising from the heart of the Thar Desert.

india_destinations.name: Jodhpur
india_destinations.description: The 'Blue City', known for its massive fort and blue-painted houses.

india_destinations.name: Kanyakumari
india_destinations.description: The southernmost tip of India, where three oceans meet.

india_destinations.name: Kaziranga
india_destinations.description: UNESCO site home to the world's largest population of one-horned rhinos.

india_destinations.name: Khajuraho
india_destinations.description: Famous for its stunning group of temples with expressive stone carvings.

india_destinations.name: Kochi
india_destinations.description: A historic port city where Europe meets the Malabar Coast.

india_destinations.name: Kodaikanal
india_destinations.description: The 'Princess of Hill Stations', known for its cool mountain mist.

india_destinations.name: Kohima
india_destinations.description: A high-altitude capital with a fierce history and tribal culture.

india_destinations.name: Kolkata
india_destinations.description: The cultural capital of India, rich in colonial history and art.

india_destinations.name: Leh
india_destinations.description: High-altitude desert city with dramatic landscapes and monasteries.

india_destinations.name: Lonavala
india_destinations.description: Popular monsoon getaway for city dwellers from Mumbai and Pune.

india_destinations.name: Madurai
india_destinations.description: One of India's oldest cities, centered around the spectacular Meenakshi shrine.

india_destinations.name: Mahabalipuram
india_destinations.description: Coastal town famed for its ancient rock-cut Pallava architecture.

india_destinations.name: Manali
india_destinations.description: Popular resort town in the Himalayas, perfect for adventure and snow.

india_destinations.name: Mount Abu
india_destinations.description: Rajasthan's only hill station, famous for its intricate marble temples.

india_destinations.name: Mumbai
india_destinations.description: The financial hub and home of Bollywood, a city that never sleeps.

india_destinations.name: Munnar
india_destinations.description: Lush green hills covered in endless tea plantations.

india_destinations.name: Mussoorie
india_destinations.description: The 'Queen of Hills', a classic Victorian-era mountain retreat.

india_destinations.name: Mysore
india_destinations.description: The royal city of Karnataka, famous for its magnificent palaces.

india_destinations.name: Nainital
india_destinations.description: A beautiful lake town nestled in the Kumaon Himalayas.

india_destinations.name: Nashik
india_destinations.description: India's wine capital and a major spiritual center on the Godavari.

india_destinations.name: Ooty
india_destinations.description: Blue mountains, rolling hills, and colonial charm in the Nilgiris.

india_destinations.name: Orchha
india_destinations.description: A hidden gem of Bundela architecture on the Betwa river.

india_destinations.name: Pondicherry
india_destinations.description: A coastal slice of France in India, known for its yellow buildings and ashrams.

india_destinations.name: Pune
india_destinations.description: Cultural capital of Maharashtra, known for its history and youth culture.

india_destinations.name: Puri
india_destinations.description: Holy seaside city and home to one of the world's grandest festivals.

india_destinations.name: Pushkar
india_destinations.description: Sacred lake town and the only world site dedicated to Lord Brahma.

india_destinations.name: Rameswaram
india_destinations.description: Sacred island city at the tip of India, crucial to the Ramayana trail.

india_destinations.name: Rann of Kutch
india_destinations.description: A surreal white salt desert that comes alive during the Rann Utsav.

india_destinations.name: Rishikesh
india_destinations.description: The Yoga capital of the world, where the holy Ganges flows.

india_destinations.name: Shillong
india_destinations.description: The 'Scotland of the East', known for its waterfalls and pine trees.

india_destinations.name: Shimla
india_destinations.description: The colonial-era summer capital of British India.

india_destinations.name: Somnath
india_destinations.description: The site of the first Jyotirlinga, a magnificent temple on the ocean shore.

india_destinations.name: Srinagar
india_destinations.description: Paradise on Earth, famous for its houseboats and gardens.

india_destinations.name: Surat
india_destinations.description: The Diamond City of India, the fastest-growing modern economic hub.

india_destinations.name: Tawang
india_destinations.description: Home to India's largest monastery and breathtaking mountain lakes.

india_destinations.name: Tirupati
india_destinations.description: World's most visited sacred shrine, located atop the Seshachalam Hills.

india_destinations.name: Udaipur
india_destinations.description: The 'City of Lakes', known for its romantic palaces and sunsets.

india_destinations.name: Udupi
india_destinations.description: Famous temple town and the birthplace of world-renowned Udupi cuisine.

india_destinations.name: Varanasi
india_destinations.description: World's oldest living city, the spiritual heart of India on the Ganges.

india_destinations.name: Vijayawada
india_destinations.description: A bustling city on the Krishna River with ancient rock-cut treasures.

india_destinations.name: Vizag
india_destinations.description: The City of Destiny, a coastal port with stunning beaches and hills.

india_destinations.name: Wayanad
india_destinations.description: Green paradise in the Western Ghats with ancient caves and waterfalls.

india_destinations.name: Warangal
india_destinations.description: Ancient capital of the Kakatiya dynasty, rich in stone architecture.

india_destinations.name: Kanchipuram
india_destinations.description: The City of Thousand Temples and the world's finest silk weaving hub.

india_destinations.name: Arunachalam
india_destinations.description: Sacred fire element city at the base of the mystic Arunachala hill.
